triggers.description: When CARDNAME attacks or blocks, sacrifice it at end of combat.
Whenever CARDNAME attacks or blocks, sacrifice it at end of combat.

replacements.description: If CARDNAME would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.

statics.description: Enchanted creature has "Whenever this creature attacks, create a 4/4 white Spirit creature token with flying that's tapped and attacking. Sacrifice that token at end of combat."
